problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Fear. Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
